title: Emulyte (Old)
description: Do you love pink and purple? Then why not install Emulyte ?
body:
# INTRODUCTION
Welcome on the page of my Mod: **Emulyte : Old** !

I don't see this project as a big mod. I did it to have fun and fulfill my desires! 

If I could describe this project in one sentence, it would be: "A more or less vanilla mod, adding a bit of content for the bored".

Finally, I think my mod would be ideal in a small modpack.

# DISCOVER
As I see it, my mod can be divided into three parts, which we'll detail below!
## Rosium desert
The Rosium Desert is a new biome, with pink (sand) and black (basalt) colors. Here you'll find new blocks, new mobs, a temple, a house and a dungeon in the sky. In the basalt is a strange new coal...
## Emulyte ore
Emulyte is the new purple mineral in this mod! It's found deep in the caves of the overworld, and building armor with it is a real challenge. 

Some Rosium Coal can also be found in Tuff.
## Soul stone forest
Just a new nether biome? Hell no! The soul sand now has its own stone, and the biome is home to a new structure and a silver tree. But be prepared, because tormented souls leave no one in peace.

# IMPORTANT
1 - I strongly advise you to use the JEI mod for crafts. Enjoy the game !

2 - I own this mod (ThommyzTV on CurseForge, the first versions of the mod were released there).

3 - A more recent and modified version is in preparation and will not be on this page, so follow my profile to find out what's next.

### _See you soon..._
